name: Buttermilk Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Cream butter and shortening until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Dissolve baking soda in buttermilk.
5. Combine flour and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Beat just until blended after each addition.
6. Stir in lemon extract and almond extract.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes, then remove from the pan and let cool completely on a wire rack.
